title: weigela florida var. variegata
intro: Weigela florida var. variegata, also known as the Variegated Weigela or Pink Weigela, is a deciduous shrub native to East Asia, characterized by its attractive, variegated leaves and vibrant pink flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine, particularly in Chinese and Japanese herbalism, for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The leaves and flowers of Weigela florida var. variegata are believed to have health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving rheumatic pain, and aiding in the treatment of skin conditions such as eczema. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional remedies for its purported antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects.
